name: Sourdough Pancakes #3
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients well until combined.
2. Cook the batter on a hot griddle or pan.
3. Flip the pancakes when bubbles form on the surface and the edges are set, about 2 minutes per side.
4. Serve immediately for best flavor and texture. This is a great recipe for camping trips.
5. If fresh eggs are unavailable, you can substitute with 1 tablespoon powdered eggs.
